create_announcement_with_existing_organi.description: Create announcement linked to an existing organization by ID

body.title: Software Development Internship
body.description: Join our development team for an exciting internship opportunity. You'll work on real projects and gain valuable experience.

create_announcement_with_custom_organiza.description: Create announcement with custom organization name (not linked)

body.title: Research Opportunity
body.description: Exciting research position available at our institute. Perfect for graduate students.

body.title: General Announcement
body.description: This is a general announcement not associated with any specific organization.

search_organizations.description: Search for existing organizations before creating announcement

both_organization_fields_provided.description: Error when both organization_id and organization_name are provided

organization: Cannot specify both organization_id and organization_name. Choose one.

invalid_organization_id.description: Error when organization_id does not exist

body.title: Invalid Organization Test
body.description: This should fail because organization doesn't exist

organization_id: Organization with this ID does not exist.

search_without_query.description: Error when searching organizations without query parameter

curl_examples.create_with_existing_org: curl -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/awn/api/create-announcements/' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <admin_token>' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "Software Development Internship", "description": "Join our development team...", "start_date": "2024-01-15", "end_date": "2024-06-15", "url": "https://company.com/internship", "category": 1, "organization_id": 5}'
curl_examples.create_with_custom_name: curl -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/awn/api/create-announcements/' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <admin_token>' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "Research Opportunity", "description": "Exciting research position...", "start_date": "2024-02-01", "end_date": "2024-08-01", "url": "https://research.org/opportunity", "category": 2, "organization_name": "International Research Institute"}'

notes.authentication: Replace <admin_token> with actual JWT token obtained from /awn/api/auth/login/
notes.categories: Make sure the category IDs exist in your database
notes.organization_ids: Use actual organization IDs from your database or search results
notes.validation: End date must be after start date
